mapper.select: /* RoleMapper.findAllActiveRoles */ SELECT ROLE_ID AS roleId , ROLE_NAME AS roleName , ROLE_CODE AS roleCode , USE_YN AS useYn FROM ROLE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY ROLE_ID ASC

/* RoleMapper.findPermissionsByRoleId */ SELECT R.ROLE_CODE AS roleCode , M.MENU_CODE AS menuCode , M.MENU_NAME AS menuName , M.MENU_PATH AS menuPath , RM.CAN_READ AS canRead , RM.CAN_CREATE AS canCreate , RM.CAN_UPDATE AS canUpdate , RM.CAN_DELETE AS canDelete , 'TEST' AS TEST FROM ROLE_MENU RM INNER JOIN ROLE R ON RM.ROLE_ID = R.ROLE_ID INNER JOIN MENU M ON RM.MENU_ID = M.MENU_ID WHERE R.ROLE_CODE = #{roleCode} AND R.USE_YN = 'Y' AND M.USE_YN = 'Y' AND RM.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY M.SORT_ORDER ASC, M.MENU_ID ASC

/* RoleMapper.findPermissionsByRoleCode */ SELECT R.ROLE_CODE AS roleCode , M.MENU_CODE AS menuCode , M.MENU_NAME AS menuName , M.MENU_PATH AS menuPath , RM.CAN_READ AS canRead , RM.CAN_CREATE AS canCreate , RM.CAN_UPDATE AS canUpdate , RM.CAN_DELETE AS canDelete FROM ROLE_MENU RM INNER JOIN ROLE R ON RM.ROLE_ID = R.ROLE_ID INNER JOIN MENU M ON RM.MENU_ID = M.MENU_ID WHERE R.ROLE_CODE = #{roleCode} AND R.USE_YN = 'Y' AND M.USE_YN = 'Y' AND RM.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY M.SORT_ORDER ASC, M.MENU_ID ASC
